archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast (Archetype 4) merged with Performance Pro (Archetype 2)
theme_strategy: Multi-theme dark mode desktop application. The aesthetic is tactical, dense, and professional (Control Room grid).

cyber_neon.name: Cyber Neon
cyber_neon.description: Deep synthwave void with aggressive high-contrast accents.

amber_crt.name: Amber CRT
amber_crt.description: Retro terminal aesthetic, deep sepia and glowing amber.

hierarchy.code: text-sm font-mono text-text_secondary bg-surface border border-border px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded

rules.headers: Use sans-serif for module and panel titles. Avoid large hero typography; this is a dense admin tool.
rules.data: Use monospace (JetBrains Mono) for IP addresses, disk sizes (GB), ports, player counts, and INI keys.
rules.buttons: Uppercase mono or bold sans for primary CTAs (Start/Stop).

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Control Room Grid (Dense). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. gap-4.
spacing_and_layout.density: High. Use p-3 or p-4 inside panels instead of the generous p-8 marketing defaults.
spacing_and_layout.borders: Exposed grid style. 1px solid borders (border-border). Avoid soft shadows; use sharp 2px shadows or none.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: Sharp or minimal. rounded-sm (2px) or rounded-md (4px). Never rounded-full or rounded-xl unless it's a status dot.
spacing_and_layout.sidebar: Fixed left sidebar (w-64 or w-20 collapsed) holding server profiles. Distinctive top-left '+' button with border-b separation.
spacing_and_layout.top_bar: Fixed height (h-14). Acts as Electron drag region (app-region: drag). Contains window controls, global stats, theme/lang picker.

buttons.primary: Solid bg-primary text-background font-bold px-4 py-2 rounded-sm hover:-translate-y-[1px] transition-transform
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-border text-text_primary px-4 py-2 rounded-sm hover:border-text_secondary hover:text-white transition-colors
buttons.action_icon: p-2 rounded-sm text-text_secondary hover:bg-surface hover:text-primary transition-colors
buttons.server_start_stop: Large, prominent button in header. Green state (Start), Red state (Stop), Yellow state (Updating). Use glowing box-shadow for active states.

collapsible_panels.style: Accordion style. Header has bg-surface, border-b border-border. Chevron right icon rotates 90deg on open. Content area has bg-background p-4.

inputs.text: bg-surface border border-border rounded-sm px-3 py-1.5 text-sm text-text_primary focus:outline-none focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/20
inputs.select: Same as text input. Use custom Shadcn dropdown over native <select>.
inputs.toggle_switch: Tactical toggle. Square/Sharp edges preferred over round pills.

progress_bars.disk_capacity: Segmented bar. Height h-3. Free Space (gray/surface), Used OS/Other (dark gray), SCUM Allocation (primary color). Tooltip on hover.

tabs.server_profiles: Vertical tabs in sidebar. Active state: border-l-2 border-primary bg-surface/50 text-text_primary. Inactive: border-l-2 border-transparent text-text_secondary.

animation_guidelines.philosophy: Utilitarian. Fast and predictable. No bouncy physics. No slow fades.
animation_guidelines.micro_interactions: Hover states on all list items and buttons. Start/Stop server buttons should have a slight 'pulse' effect when processing/starting.

1_admin_uac_prompt.visuals: Warning icon (Lucide TriangleAlert). 'Yönetici İzni Gerekli'. Text explaining that LGSSManagers needs admin rights to install and run the SCUM Server.

2_disk_selection_wizard.layout: Centered multi-step card layout. 'İlk Kurulum - Disk Seçimi'.
2_disk_selection_wizard.components: List of available drives (C:, D:). Each row shows a 'disk_capacity' progress bar. Shows 'SCUM Sunucusu İçin Gerekli: ~30GB'.
2_disk_selection_wizard.interactions: Drives with <30GB free space are disabled/dimmed. User selects a drive -> 'İleri' button enables -> App creates 'LGSSManagers' folder on the chosen drive.

3_empty_main_workspace.layout: Standard shell (Sidebar + Top Bar + Empty Main Content).
3_empty_main_workspace.sidebar: Shows only the large, elevated '+' button at the top ('Yeni Sunucu Ekle').
3_empty_main_workspace.main_area: Centered empty state. Uses the theme-specific background image. 'Sol üstten + butonuna basarak ilk sunucunuzu oluşturun.'
3_empty_main_workspace.top_bar: Global IP, Task Status (Otomatik Yedekleme, Discord Bot - inactive state).

4_server_profile_tab.layout: 2-column or 3-column Bento grid of collapsible panels.
4_server_profile_tab.header: Server Name ('Server1'), Status Badge (Running/Stopped/Updating), Start/Stop Button row.
4_server_profile_tab.main_area: Collapsible panels: Administration (Ports, Passwords), World (Max Players, Time Speed), Economy (Loot Multipliers), Vehicles, Puppets (Zombies).
4_server_profile_tab.footer_actions: 'Ayarları Kaydet' (Sticky bottom right or top right header).

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Use kebab-case and role-based naming.

theme_backgrounds.description: Atmospheric backgrounds to be used in the Empty Main Workspace or Login/Setup screens to establish the theme's mood at low opacity.

instructions_to_main_agent.architecture: This is a React frontend built for an Electron shell. Do not use Next.js specific routing or SSR features. Use pure React (Vite/CRA) paradigms. Use .js/.jsx extensions.
instructions_to_main_agent.i18n: Implement i18n support from the start (Turkish and English). Build UI with text lengths in mind (Turkish words can be longer).
instructions_to_main_agent.theme_switching: Implement a context or Zustand store to hold the active theme and inject it via data-theme attribute on the root html/body to switch CSS variables. The themes map to the 4 palettes provided in this JSON.
instructions_to_main_agent.ui_library: Use Shadcn UI components but strip out the soft radii. Inject the tactical CSS rules (rounded-sm, harsh borders) defined in the component_patterns section.
instructions_to_main_agent.icons: Use lucide-react. Standardize sizes (e.g., size={16} for inline, size={20} for sidebar tabs).
instructions_to_main_agent.ipc_communication: Keep Electron IPC calls mockable in the frontend so UI development can proceed independently. Ensure data-testid strings are preserved for E2E testing.
